auth_get_user: SELECT id_user, name, email, password, role, created_at, last_login FROM user WHERE email = :email
auth_user_exists: SELECT 1 AS exists_flag FROM user WHERE email = :email OR name = :name LIMIT 1
auth_create_user: INSERT INTO user(name, email, password, ip, agent, created_at, last_login, role) VALUES (:name, :email, :password, :ip, :agent, :created_at, :last_login, :role)
auth_update_last_login: UPDATE user SET last_login = :last_login WHERE id_user = :id_user
